productDisplayName: Fastrack Unisex Navy Red Single Strap Backpack
description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this red and navy backpack from fastrack. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it is sure to accomodate everything you think of, while you strut around looking super funky!Made of nylon for enhanced durabilityOne large roomy main compartment with two smaller zippered pockets for stowing away essentialsMesh panels on the front for added attractionSmall pouch on the front with a mesh outer Single adjustable strap that goes across the chestPadded strap with mesh on the inner side for better breathability and comfortPouch with a velcro closure attached to the strap to hold a mobile phoneBrand tab appliqued to mobile pouch and on the sideWaist clasp to hold the bag in placeHaul loop for handling easeBranded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long lifeCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
